item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 8min This weekend’s best moments, starting today
Follow LIVE highlights from the Leinster & Munster Championships across the weekend
All the key scores, big plays & turning points as they happen 1 314

item.title: BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 10min Watch: World Snooker Championship - champion Zhao v Highfield; Allen v Zhang bbc.co.uk
item.description: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 10min Watch: World Snooker Championship - champion Zhao v Highfield; Allen v Zhang bbc.co.uk World Snooker Championship 2026 LIVE: Watch world champion Zhao Xintong, Mark Williams & Barry... Watch live coverage and follow text updates as Zhao Xintong takes on Liam Highfield & Mark Allen takes on Zhang Anda in first round at the Crucible in Sheffield. 157

item.title: GAAPlusOfficial: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 52min Donegal's recently retired ex-captain thinks talk of Derry being at the top table in Gaeli
item.description: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 52min Donegal's recently retired ex-captain thinks talk of Derry being at the top table in Gaelic Football right now, even in Ulster, is extremely premature.... 2 701

The GAA @officialgaa · 1h Listen to @Galway_GAA captain Darren Morrissey discuss the @gaaleinster SHC, emerging players in Micheál Donoghue's panel, and the connection with supporters ahead of today's Pearse Stadium clash against @KilkennyCLG
https:// soundcloud.com/officialgaa/ga a-ie-interview-galway-1 … 2 1 mil
